title: Diagnostics Lookup (diagnostics-lookup v1.0)
description: Response contract for GET /api/diagnostics. Read-only facade over persisted diagnostics.snapshot.json; does not trigger rebuild.

status.description: Lookup outcome. 'ok' means snapshot was loaded. 'not_found' means no diagnostics snapshot file exists. 'error' means snapshot file exists but could not be parsed.

snapshot.description: Raw diagnostics snapshot payload from .gewebe/cache/diagnostics.snapshot.json. Null for not_found/error.

freshness.description: Derived freshness metadata from snapshot.generated_at and diagnostics TTL. Null when generated_at is missing/invalid or lookup failed.

warnings.description: Non-fatal diagnostics messages. Empty for status='ok'.
